news.summary: One individual Bitcoin miner successfully earned a block reward worth $330,000, even as the network difficulty reached a new high of 126.98 trillion.
news.headline: One Bitcoin miner wins $330K block reward amidst record difficulty surge to 126.98 trillion on network.

news.summary: A report on financial performance is expected from Cracker Barrel Old Country Store, Inc. (NASDAQ: CBRL) on June 5 before the market opens. Analysts predict earnings of 21 cents per share for the third quarter, a decline from 88 cents per share a year ago. Revenue for the quarter is projected to be $822.43 million, up from $817.13 million in the prior year. In the second quarter, the company surpassed expectations with adjusted earnings per share at $1.38, exceeding the forecast of $1.00. Sales for that quarter came in at $949.44 million, marking a 1.5% increase from the previous year and surpassing the consensus of $943.58 million. Following the news, Cracker Barrel shares rose by 2.6%. For more details, visit a leading financial news platform.
news.headline: Wall Street analysts lowered Cracker Barrel's Q3 profit expectations to 21 cents/share from 88 cents last year. Quarterly revenue projected at $822.43 million. Stock gained 2.6%.

news.summary: Ciena Corporation (NYSE: CIEN) is set to announce its second-quarter financial results on Thursday, June 5. Analysts anticipate earnings per share to reach 52 cents, a notable increase from the 27 cents reported in the same period last year. The Maryland-based company is expected to reveal quarterly revenue of $1.09 billion, up from $910.83 million in the previous year. In the first quarter of fiscal 2025, Ciena generated a revenue of $1.07 billion, representing a 3.3% growth compared to the previous year and surpassing the analyst consensus of $1.05 billion. The company's shares closed at $83.89, marking a 0.8% increase on Wednesday. For further details, interested individuals can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga to access the latest analyst ratings and sort information by stock ticker, company name, analyst, etc.
news.headline: Ciena (NYSE:CIEN) set to release Q2 results with estimated earnings at 52 cents per share, revenue at $1.09 billion. Stocks grew by 0.8%.

news.summary: Suzano, the top pulp producer globally, and Kimberly-Clark, a leading consumer staples firm, revealed a partnership valued at US$3.4 billion. This joint venture is centered on producing, promoting, and distributing consumer and professional tissue items like toilet paper, napkins, paper towels, and facial tissues across 70+ nations. In this venture, Suzano will secure a 51 percent stake, while Kimberly-Clark will retain a 49 percent ownership.
news.headline: Suzano and Kimberly-Clark team up for $3.4B joint venture, leading global tissue company in 70+ countries. Suzano to hold 51%.

news.summary: In a recent update, it has been reported that the global sales revenue for the tech industry rose by 10% in the last quarter, reaching a staggering $500 billion. Additionally, smartphone sales saw a notable increase of 15%, with a total of 400 million units sold worldwide. The rise in demand for smart home devices was also evident, with a 20% increase in sales compared to the previous quarter. These numbers reflect a growing trend of technology consumption and adoption on a global scale.
news.headline: Meta's focus on military tech drives change reports.
$KMB - KIMBERLY-CLARK - CO'S INTERESTS IN MEXICO AND ITS JOINT VENTURE IN SOUTH KOREA ARE OUTSIDE SCOPE OF THIS TRANSACTION

$KMB - KIMBERLY-CLARK CORP: PARTNERSHIP WITH SUZANO THAT WILL CREATE PREEMINENT INTERNATIONAL TISSUE AND PROFESSIONAL PRODUCTS COMPANY KIMBERLY-CLARK - DEAL EXPECTED TO BE ABOUT $0.30-0.40 DILUTIVE TO ADJUSTED EARNINGS PER SHARE IN FIRST FULL YEAR FOLLOWING CLOSE
$KMB - KIMBERLY-CLARK ANNOUNCES MAJOR STEP FORWARD IN ITS POWERING CARE TRANSFORMATION KIMBERLY-CLARK CORP: PROPOSED DEAL FOR ENTERPRISE VALUE FOR BUSINESS OF APPROXIMATELY $3.4 BLN

news.summary: Metalpha Technology Holding Limited has partnered with DogeOS to drive innovation of Dogecoin (DOGE) as a leading cryptocurrency. Metalpha, known for providing digital asset-focused wealth management services, aims to combine institutional support for proof-of-work ecosystems with DogeOS's vision to transform DOGE into a versatile blockchain platform for gaming, DeFi, and AI. This strategic alliance is significant for DOGE as it has over 4 million daily transactions and a market capitalization in the top 10 cryptocurrencies. The partnership aims to bring institutional liquidity into the DogeOS ecosystem, potentially enabling native DOGE yield and DeFi opportunities for DOGE holders beyond just trading.
news.headline: Metalpha partners with DogeOS to boost Dogecoin; aims to expand its integration into gaming, DeFi, and AI.

Anglo American Plc is about to begin a formal sales process for De Beers, after receiving indications of interest from potential buyers that include two former chief executives of the iconic diamond miner. -- BBG

news.summary: The Joint Corp., operating as the largest provider of chiropractic care in the US through The Joint Chiropractic ® network, revealed on June 5, 2025, that its board of directors approved a stock repurchase initiative. The program, slated to commence in August 2025, will enable the company to buy back approximately $5 million worth of its common stock.
news.headline: The Joint Corp. to repurchase up to $5 million of its common stock starting in August 2025. #stockrepurchase

Lula: ‘The president received my delegation with the hospitality that only a great friend can offer. This state visit is the first that a Brazilian leader has made to France in 13 years. Some aspects of the bilateral relationship have weakened during this period,

news.summary: In a recent development, Counsel Press Inc., an outsourced legal services platform owned by Align Capital Partners (ACP), has made a strategic move by expanding its services into the service of process market. This decision came with the acquisition of Legalex LLC, based in New York City. Legalex is recognized for its innovative technology-enabled platform that offers comprehensive support for process serving, court e-filing, skip tracing, and investigative services throughout the United States. The acquisition of Legalex is seen as a significant step in Counsel Press' growth strategy as it ventures into new territories to enhance its service offerings.
news.headline: Counsel Press expands by acquiring Legalex LLC, a tech platform for process serving & court services in all 50 states.

news.summary: In Vancouver, CIBC Innovation Banking has disclosed funding support for CyberQP, a top provider of Zero Trust Helpdesk Security solutions. The investment aims to aid CyberQP in expanding globally and advancing its goal of revolutionizing IT teams' approach to securing access and enhancing operational processes. CyberQP's platform assists organizations in safeguarding technician and end-user access, minimizing cyber threats, and enhancing helpdesk productivity through a unified system.
news.headline: CIBC Innovation Banking funds CyberQP, a Zero Trust Helpdesk Security provider, for global expansion.

news.summary: Ciena® Corporation, a company specializing in networking systems, services, and software, has reported its financial performance for the second quarter of the fiscal year. The announcement was made in Hanover, Maryland. The company shared key numbers regarding their earnings and revenue for the quarter, showcasing their market position and growth.
news.headline: Ciena announces Q2 results for 2025, a networking systems company based in Hanover, Md.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia and Toronto, WELL Health Technologies Corp. (TSX: WELL) (OTCQX: WHTCF) has appointed Ric Leong, CPA, CA, BSc. as the Chief Accounting Officer, starting May 20th. WELL is a digital healthcare company aimed at improving health outcomes globally through technology for healthcare practitioners and patients. Mr. Leong's role is to enhance the company's financial operations.
news.headline: WELL Health names Ric Leong as new Chief Accounting Officer, effective May 20th. TSX: WELL, OTCQX: WHTCF.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, Ocugen, Inc., a biotechnology company listed on NASDAQ as OCGN, revealed a significant development in its mission to combat blindness diseases. The company disclosed the initiation of negotiations for a licensing agreement with a renowned pharmaceutical and healthcare entity in Korea. This agreement aims to secure exclusive rights within Korea for OCU400, Ocugen's innovative modifier gene therapy designed for treating retinitis pigmentosa (RP). This strategic move signifies an important step forward in Ocugen's efforts to expand the reach of its groundbreaking therapies in the global market.
news.headline: Ocugen, Inc. signs term sheet to license OCU400 gene therapy for retinitis pigmentosa in Korea. Important numbers: June 05, 2025 (NASDAQ: OCGN)

news.summary: Dine Brands Global, Inc. (NYSE: DIN) based in Pasadena, California, which owns Applebee’s Neighborhood Grill + Bar®, IHOP® restaurants, and Fuzzy’s Taco Shop®, has revealed a new development. The company has signed a purchase agreement for its subsidiaries to issue and sell the Series 2025-1 Class A-2, Fixed Rate Senior Secured Notes. Two special purpose subsidiaries, the Co-Issuers, are involved in this agreement. This move signifies a strategic financial decision for Dine Brands Global, with the Class A-2 notes being a part of the transaction. This announcement marks a significant step for the Corporation in terms of its financial planning and future investments.
news.headline: Dine Brands Global, Inc. secures $600M securitized financing facility, issuing Series 2025-1 Class A-2 notes.

news.summary: In San Jose, California, BrightSign, known for its advanced digital media players and operating system, has launched new toolkits to enhance digital signage effectiveness. These tools utilize artificial intelligence (AI) insights to streamline workflows and maximize views for organizations. With digital displays outperforming static ones in capturing attention, these advancements aim to help partners and end users achieve unprecedented success in their digital signage strategies.
news.headline: BrightSign announces AI toolkits at InfoComm 2025 for customized, captivating digital signage.

news.summary: In New York today, the three-time SailGP champions of Australia announced a new identity and revealed two new co-owners, Hollywood stars Hugh Jackman and Ryan Reynolds. The BONDS Flying Roos SailGP Team, led by driver and CEO Tom Slingsby, welcomes the new co-owners who will play a key role in the team's management and direction. With BONDS underwear now sponsoring the team, the athletes will be supported by the comfort and style of their gear. The involvement of Hugh Jackman and Ryan Reynolds adds star power to the team's ownership and signals an exciting new chapter for the Australian sailing team.
news.headline: Hugh Jackman & Ryan Reynolds co-own Australia's SailGP team with Tom Slingsby, promoting BONDS underwear.

news.summary: In Toronto, Flow Beverage Corp. (TSX:FLOW; OTCPK:FLWBF) revealed that Trent MacDonald has resigned from his roles as Chief Financial Officer and Executive Vice-President of Operations. The Board of Directors is actively seeking his replacement and is in final talks with a potential candidate for the CFO position. In the meantime, the Company's Director of Finance will assume comparable responsibilities.
news.headline: Flow Beverage Corp. (TSX:FLOW; OTCPK:FLWBF) announces CEO stepping down. Company seeks new CFO.

news.summary: A Massachusetts-based company, The Cannabist Company Holdings Inc., known for its expertise in cultivating, manufacturing, and retailing cannabis products in the U.S., has appointed two independent directors, Tom Lynch and Peter Lee, to its Board of Directors. This move comes in line with the Amended and Restated Indenture dated May 29, 2025. The company's stock is listed as Cboe CA: CBST and as OTCQB: CBSTF.
news.headline: The Cannabist Company appoints Tom Lynch and Peter Lee as independent directors to its board, conforming to the May 29, 2025 Indenture.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, in Chatham, N.J., Tonix Pharmaceuticals Holding Corp. (Nasdaq: TNXP) revealed its participation at the Annual European Congress of Rheumatology (EULAR) 2025 in Barcelona, Spain from June 11 to 14. Tonix, a biotechnology company, showcased its poster presentation at the event. This company is fully integrated with both marketed products and a pipeline of development candidates.
news.headline: Tonix Pharmaceuticals presenting at EULAR Congress 2025 in Barcelona, Spain on June 11-14, 2025. Company's Nasdaq symbol: TNXP.

news.summary: In Marysville, Ohio, as of June 5, 2025, The Scotts Miracle-Gro Company, known for its consumer lawn and garden products, has upheld its fiscal year 2025 guidance. This leading company in the industry, listed as NYSE: SMG, operates in both traditional and innovative growing methods like indoor and hydroponic systems. They have provided an update on their guidance for the full fiscal year 2025, which includes insights from the initial two months of the fiscal third quarter. This announcement precedes their attendance at the William Blair Annual Growth Stock Conference.
news.headline: ScottsMiracle-Gro reaffirms fiscal 2025 guidance, reports strong consumer engagement in lawn and garden season.

news.summary: A technology company, Lottery.com Inc. (Nasdaq: LTRY) based in Fort Worth, Texas, is making strides in the gaming, sports, and entertainment industries. Matthew McGahan, the Chairman and CEO, will be speaking at the Noble Capital Markets 2025 Emerging Growth Virtual Equity Conference on June 5, 2025, at 1:30 PM Eastern Time. This event marks an important opportunity for the company to share insights and connect with stakeholders.
news.headline: Lottery.com Inc. (Nasdaq: LTRY) CEO to present at Noble Capital Markets’ 2025 conference on June 5, 1:30 PM ET.

news.summary: Premier American Uranium Inc. and Nuclear Fuels Inc. have recently signed a definitive agreement on June 4, 2025, for Premier American Uranium to acquire all outstanding common shares of Nuclear Fuels. Nuclear Fuels, which owns a 100% stake in the Kaycee Uranium Project in Wyoming's Powder River Basin, boasts a substantial asset base including over 4,200 drill holes and 430 miles of mapped roll fronts across a 35-mile trend of altered and mineralized sandstones. The agreement includes the purchase of all issued NF Shares by Premier American Uranium through a court-approved plan of arrangement. Additionally, Nuclear Fuels possesses five exploration projects in uranium-rich regions of Wyoming, Utah, and Arizona. Premier American Uranium trades on the TSXV as PUR and OTCQB as PAUIF, while Nuclear Fuels is listed on the CSE as NF and OTCQX as NFUNF.
news.headline: Premier American Uranium to acquire Nuclear Fuels, forming one of America’s largest pure-play uranium explorers. Deal involves acquiring all outstanding shares of Nuclear Fuels, including the Kaycee Uranium Project in Wyoming's Powder River Basin. Nuclear Fuels also holds five other exploration projects.

news.summary: In Eden Prairie, Minnesota on June 5, 2025, Winnebago Industries, Inc. (NYSE: WGO), a prominent manufacturer of outdoor lifestyle products, revealed their initial financial figures for the third quarter of fiscal 2025. This announcement was made prior to their involvement in the Baird 2025 Global Consumer Technology & Services Conference on the same day.
news.headline: Winnebago Industries, leading outdoor product manufacturer, announces Q3 fiscal 2025 results before Baird Conference.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, as of June 5, 2025, AVRICORE HEALTH INC. announced the appointment of Rodger Seccombe as the new CEO. Seccombe, who is currently the Chief Technology Officer of Avricore, also holds the position of President and Co-Founder of HealthTab™ Inc., a subsidiary of the company. AVRICORE HEALTH INC. is listed on the TSXV under the ticker symbol AVCR.
news.headline: Avricore announces Rodger Seccombe as CEO. Seccombe is currently CTO and President of HealthTab™ Inc.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, in Mississauga, Ontario, Next Hydrogen Solutions Inc. (TSXV:NXH, OTC:NXHSF) reported the successful outcome of their annual general shareholders meeting on June 4, 2025. A total of 5,778,769 common shares, equivalent to 25.214% of shares outstanding, were represented either in person or by proxy. All resolutions presented at the meeting were duly authorized and accepted.
news.headline: Next Hydrogen Solutions Inc. reports successful Annual General Meeting with 5,778,769 common shares (25.214% of total) represented.

news.summary: Discover a selection of craft beers perfect for the sunny season from top breweries. Enjoy offerings from Atwater Brewery, Blue Point Brewing, Breckenridge Brewery, Montauk Brewing, Shock Top, SweetWater Brewing Co., Terrapin Beer Co., and Widmer Brother’s Brewing. Savor unique and refreshing brews from these establishments, each offering a distinct flavor profile. Indulge in a variety of options curated for beer enthusiasts looking to elevate their summer drinking experience. Try beers from award-winning craft breweries, with a range of IBU and ABV levels to cater to diverse preferences. Cheers to enjoying the sunny season with a cold and delicious craft beer in hand!
news.headline: Tilray Beverages showcases bold craft beers for summer, including brews from 8 different breweries. Perfect for sunny days.

news.summary: Branford, Connecticut, June 05, 2025 - A company specializing in real estate lending, Sachem Capital Corp. (NYSE American: SACH), declared a quarterly dividend of $0.05 per common share. The dividend is set to be paid on June 30, 2025, for shareholders of record as of June 16, 2025. The company's Board of Directors made the announcement, highlighting their focus on originating, underwriting, funding, servicing, and managing loans secured by first mortgages on real property. This move aims to benefit shareholders and strengthen the company's position in the market.
news.headline: Sachem Capital Corp. declares a $0.05 quarterly dividend for common shareholders, payable June 30.

news.summary: USA Rare Earth, Inc. (Nasdaq: USAR) appointed David Bushi as Senior VP of Manufacturing, overseeing operations at its Stillwater, Oklahoma, neodymium magnet production plant. The company shared this news on June 5, 2025.
news.headline: USA Rare Earth appoints David Bushi as Senior VP of Manufacturing to head operations at Stillwater, OK neo magnet facility.

news.summary: NexGold Mining Corp. (TSXV: NEXG; OTCQX: NXGCF) has shared a positive update on its ongoing diamond drill program at the Goldboro Project in Nova Scotia. Initially announced on January 22, 2025, the program involves drilling 25,000 meters to enhance geological and grade continuity in specific areas of the open pit Mineral Resource. So far, three diamond drills at Goldboro have completed about 22,000 meters of drilling. The company aims to finish the program by the end of Q2, showing solid progress towards its goals.
news.headline: NexGold reports drilling results: 11.87 g/t over 6.1m & 3.77 g/t over 9.1m at Goldboro Project. 25,000m program to improve resource identified.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, Giyani Metals Corp. (TSXV:EMM, GR:A2DUU8) disclosed the appointment of Nigel Robinson as the incoming Chair and Martin Botha as new board member of the company. Giyani, the developer of the K.Hill battery-grade manganese project in Botswana, made the announcement. This move strengthens the leadership of the company as it progresses with its operations.
news.headline: Giyani Metals Corp announces Nigel Robinson as new Chair and Martin Botha to board of directors.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, Mattr Corp. disclosed the sale of its subsidiary Thermotite do Brazil to Vallourec Tubular Solutions Ltda., a subsidiary of Vallourec S.A., for $17.5 million USD (about $24 million CAD). This marks Mattr's exit from the pipe coating business, with the transaction being cash-free and debt-free, and subjected to typical working capital alterations. This move demonstrates Mattr's strategic shift in its business operations.
news.headline: Mattr sells Thermotite for $17.5 million USD to Vallourec, receiving $24 million CAD; finalizing pipe coating business divestiture.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on June 5, 2025, Rubicon Organics Inc. (TSXV: ROMJ) (OTCQX: ROMJF) disclosed the completion of acquiring a fully operational, specialized 47,500 square foot indoor cultivation plant in Hope, British Columbia. Rubicon Organics is a licensed manufacturer concentrating on the development and distribution of premium cannabis goods that are both organic certified. This purchase marks a significant achievement in Rubicon's expansion plan to increase the production of premium and certified organic cannabis.
news.headline: Rubicon Organics buys 47.5k sq. ft. facility in Hope, BC for premium cannabis production, aims to boost growth strategy.

news.summary: At the upcoming EACCI conference in 2025, Upstream Bio will be discussing new findings on Verekitug’s increased effectiveness through targeting the TSLP receptor. This presentation will delve into the mechanisms behind Verekitug’s heightened potency in addressing allergic conditions. The conference, set to attract over 500 leading experts and researchers in the field, will provide a platform for Upstream Bio to share insights on how their innovative approach could potentially revolutionize allergy treatment.
news.headline: Upstream Bio to share Verekitug's potency insights via TSLP Receptor Targeting at EAACI Congress 2025.

news.summary: The Phase 2/3 trial for KPL-387 is set to begin in mid-2025, with the Phase 2 results anticipated in the second half of 2026. The Phase 1 data from the single ascending dose study indicate that monthly dosing is viable for the drug. A presentation and webcast will be held at the Jefferies 2025 Global Healthcare Conference at 12:50 pm ET today.
news.headline: Kiniksa Pharma plans Phase 2/3 trial of KPL-387 in recurrent pericarditis; Phase 2 data expected in 2H 2026. Presentation at Jefferies 2025 Conference today at 12:50 pm ET.

news.summary: MediPharm has recently completed the sale of its facility in Hope, British Columbia. Following this sale, the company has decided to redirect its focus towards expanding its international cultivation capacity. This expansion will take place at their facility located in Napanee, Ontario, which has been certified under the European Union's Good Manufacturing Practice standards. This shift in strategy will allow MediPharm to enhance its production capabilities and potentially increase its market reach.
news.headline: MediPharm Labs sells $4.5M Hope, BC facility and boosts EU GMP cultivation capacity in Napanee, ON.

news.summary: In a recent update, Electra Battery Materials Corporation revealed the successful completion of a feasibility level Class 3 Engineering Study for the establishment of a modular battery recycling facility next to its cobalt sulfate refinery situated north of Toronto. This news was released on June 5, 2025. The company, traded under tickers NASDAQ: ELBM and TSX-V: ELBM, expressed satisfaction with this development.
news.headline: Electra finishes engineering study for new battery recycling facility next to cobalt sulfate refinery near Toronto.

news.summary: In Gaithersburg, Maryland, Emergent BioSolutions Inc. (NYSE: EBS) has partnered with Victoria’s Voice Foundation to raise awareness about the opioid epidemic on National Naloxone Awareness Day. This initiative, honoring the late Victoria Siegel and other overdose victims, aims to save lives. Victoria’s Voice has launched the " Shine. Wear. Share. Care " campaign to educate individuals, organizations, and businesses. The campaign includes a purple light bulb symbolizing hope (Shine), a wearable promotional item (Wear), a QR code for the #sharenaloxone social media campaign (Share), and a box of NARCAN ® Nasal Spray (Care) provided by Emergent.
news.headline: Emergent BioSolutions supports National Naloxone Awareness Day on June 6, with "Shine. Wear. Share. Care" campaign. #opioids.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, Fury Gold Mines Limited (TSX and NYSE American: FURY) released its management information circular for the upcoming annual shareholder meeting. The circular can be accessed on FURY’s SEDAR profile and website. Shareholders have received the circular and related materials for the meeting. For more information, visit www.sedarplus.ca or Fury’s website at https://furygoldmines.com/investors/agm-materials/.
news.headline: Fury Gold Mines files management info circular for upcoming annual meeting of shareholders. Complete mailing to shareholders.

A hungry elephant caused a chaotic scene in a grocery store in Thailand, when he strolled in from a nearby national park and brazenly helped himself to several snacks. The shocked shopkeepers could do little but call for the park rangers during the mammoth mischief as it chowed

news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Push to Talk Market - Global Industry Size, Share, Trends, Opportunity, and Forecast, 2020-2030F" has now been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The Push to Talk Market achieved a value of USD 35.11 Billion in 2024 and is projected to hit USD 63.11 Billion by 2030, with a growth rate (CAGR) of 10.19%. The market is experiencing substantial expansion driven by increasing needs for immediate and dependable communication in sectors such as public safety, transportation, and more.
news.headline: Push to Talk Market projected to reach $63.11 Billion by 2030 with a 10.19% CAGR, increasing from $35.11 Billion in 2024.

news.summary: BrightView Holdings, based in Blue Bell, Pa., disclosed the pricing details of an underwritten secondary offering by a selling stockholder associated with KKR & Co. Inc. A total of 11,600,000 shares of BrightView's common stock will be offered in this transaction, as stated in the registration statement filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). Notably, BrightView itself is not selling any shares in this offering. The entirety of the proceeds from the sale will go to the Selling Stockholder.
news.headline: BrightView's secondary offering priced at $11,600,000 shares by KKR & Co. Inc., no shares sold by BrightView.

news.summary: A company known as GEO Group, Inc. (NYSE: GEO) based in Boca Raton, Florida, has revealed a recent deal with the Oklahoma Department of Corrections to sell the Lawton Correctional Facility, situated in Lawton, Oklahoma. The purchase agreement stands at a substantial $312 million. The transaction is anticipated to be finalized on July 25, 2025, pending the fulfillment of standard closing requirements. GEO is preparing to transfer operational control of the Facility as part of this agreement.
news.headline: GEO Group to sell Lawton Correctional Facility in Oklahoma for $312 million to Oklahoma DOC, closing on July 25, 2025.

news.summary: Dollar General, located in Goodlettsville, Tennessee, is excited to announce the addition of celebrity brands to their inventory. This new offering aims to bring both style and value to homes across the country. This move is set to enhance the shopping experience for customers, providing access to exclusive and high-quality products. With this initiative, Dollar General continues to cater to its customer base, offering a diverse range of products to meet various needs.
news.headline: Dollar General is bringing celebrity brands to add style and value to every home in Goodlettsville, Tennessee.
Traffic has opened on one track of the Evdakovo-Saguna section in the Voronezh Region, and work is underway to restore traffic on the second- Russian Railways
